name: ProteinMPNN
description: Generate sequences for a given protein backbone, or upload multiple structures to submit as a batch. Choose which residues of your protein to design / keep fixed. Select Verify with Alphafold to automatically filter and predict the structures of the top scoring sequences (by MPNN score) with AlphaFold.
capabilities: Generate sequences for a given protein backbone, or upload multiple structures to submit as a batch
Choose which residues of your protein to design / keep fixed
Select Verify with Alphafold to automatically filter and predict the structures of the top scoring sequences (by MPNN score) with AlphaFold

pdbFile.description: Protein backbone structure in PDB format. Upload multiple structures for batch submission.

designedResidues.description: Residues to design. Format: {chain}{residue} (e.g., A10 B15). If not set, all residues are designed.

fixedResidues.description: Residues to keep fixed during design

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling sequence diversity. Higher values generate more mutations.

omitAminoAcids.description: Amino acids to omit from being sampled

verifyWithAlphafold.description: Automatically filter and predict structures of top scoring sequences with AlphaFold
